industry_evidence: Name indicates hotel, spa, or hospitality operation (match: 'Hotel')
compliance_rationale: Hotels and spas process card-present and card-not-present transactions, putting them firmly in PCI DSS scope. Guest PII (passport scans, ID) drives CCPA and state breach-notification obligations.
_note: Tech can edit this file; the classifier won't overwrite it on re-runs unless --overwrite is passed.
